---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

:::{.column-screen}
:::{.hero-banner style="background-image: url('media/hero_background.jpeg');"}

:::{.hero-content}

![](media/zc-headshot.jpg){.hero-headshot}

[Zachary Cramton]{.hero-name}

[Urban Planning · Environmental Science · Spatial Data]{.hero-subtitle}

:::{.hero-links}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zcramton){target="_blank"}
[GitHub](https://github.com/zcramton){target="_blank"}
[Email](mailto:zachary@cramton.com)
:::

:::

[Beaver Complex - Fourmile Creek, Fairplay, Colorado
©2026 Zachary Cramton]{.hero-caption}

:::
:::

:::{.about-section}
<div class="column-screen" style="display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 2rem 1.5rem;">
<div style="max-width: 680px; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.8; text-align: center;">

I'm an urban and environmental planner based in Fort Collins, Colorado, with a B.S. in Ecosystem Science and Sustainability from Colorado State University. My work sits at the intersection of environmental planning, placemaking, and data analysis — building tools, writing policy, and translating technical findings into decisions that improve how communities live in their landscapes.

Recently I've led a web and records overhaul for CSU's Alternative Transportation Fee Advisory Board, authored a [micromobility impact report](media/act_2025tdm_report.pdf#page=22){target="_blank"} for the Association for Commuter Transportation, and developed a [spatial screening tool](https://github.com/zcramton/csu_nr_426/tree/main/FinalProject){target="_blank"} for beaver conflict and restoration analysis in ArcGIS Pro. My capstone project piloted the migration of NASA GLOBE Observer's Mosquito Habitat Mapper to the CitSci platform in Fort Collins.

I'm currently seeking entry-level roles in urban and environmental planning, environmental consulting, or GIS. Reach me at [zachary@cramton.com](mailto:zachary@cramton.com).

</div>
</div>
:::
